narrative:
Dodson (precinct in Highland County) has 744 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
